NCT05035212.name: RENOIR
NCT05035212.group: Adults >=60, Abrysvo (RSVpreF, Pfizer) 120 mcg IM single dose vs placebo (1st RSV season)
NCT05035212.snippet: Source: Walsh EE et al. N Engl J Med 2023;388:1465-1477 (RENOIR Abrysvo).

evidence.label: Enrollment
evidence.text: 34,284 adults aged >=60 years randomized 1:1 double-blind to Abrysvo RSVpreF 120 mcg IM single dose (n=17,215) or matched saline placebo (n=17,069) and followed through the first RSV season.

evidence.label: Primary - RSV-LRTD with >=3 Signs/Symptoms
evidence.text: RSV-LRTD with >=3 signs/symptoms: vaccine 11/17,215 vs placebo 33/17,069; vaccine efficacy 66.7% (95% CI 28.8 to 85.8). Corresponds to relative risk 0.33 (95% CI 0.17 to 0.65; P<0.001). Primary endpoint met.

evidence.label: Co-Primary - RSV-LRTD with >=2 Signs/Symptoms
evidence.text: RSV-LRTD with >=2 signs/symptoms: vaccine 11/17,215 vs placebo 77/17,069; vaccine efficacy 85.7% (95% CI 73.0 to 92.7). RR 0.14 (95% CI 0.08-0.27). Broad efficacy across subgroups including age >=70 and chronic disease.

evidence.label: Risk of Bias (RoB 2.0)
evidence.text: D1 LOW - central IVR randomization stratified by age and site. D2 LOW - double-blind placebo-controlled. D3 LOW - 96% primary follow-up through 1st RSV season. D4 LOW - central RT-PCR confirmation + blinded adjudication panel. D5 LOW - SAP locked.

evidence.label: Eligibility (AACT-derived)
evidence.text: AACT-derived (auto-populated 2026-05-04). Sex: ALL; min age 60 Years; healthy volunteers: t. CRITERIA: "Efficacy Study~Inclusion Criteria:~* Participants who are willing and able to comply with all scheduled visits, vaccination plan, laboratory tests, lifestyle considerations, frequent symptom assessment by mobile device application, and other study procedures, including collection of nasal swabs by themselves and by study staff when indicated.~* Healthy participants who are determined by medical history, physical examination (if required), and clinical judgment of the investigator to be eligible...

NCT04886596.name: AReSVi-006
NCT04886596.group: Adults >=60, Arexvy (AS01E-adjuvanted prefusion F, GSK) IM single dose vs placebo
NCT04886596.snippet: Source: Papi A et al. N Engl J Med 2023;388:595-608 (AReSVi-006 Arexvy).

evidence.label: Enrollment
evidence.text: 24,966 adults aged >=60 years randomized 1:1 double-blind to Arexvy AS01E-adjuvanted prefusion F RSV vaccine IM single dose (n=12,466) or matched saline placebo (n=12,494). Primary analysis at end of first RSV season.

evidence.label: Primary - RSV-LRTD
evidence.text: RSV-LRTD: vaccine 7/12,466 vs placebo 40/12,494; vaccine efficacy 82.6% (96.95% CI 57.9 to 94.1). Corresponds to relative risk 0.17 (95% CI 0.08 to 0.38; P<0.001). Primary endpoint met.

evidence.label: Secondary - Severe RSV-LRTD
evidence.text: Severe RSV-LRTD: vaccine 1/12,466 vs placebo 17/12,494; vaccine efficacy 94.1% (95% CI 62.4 to 99.9). RR 0.06 (95% CI 0.01-0.45). Efficacy consistent in subgroups with >=1 comorbidity.

evidence.label: Risk of Bias (RoB 2.0)
evidence.text: D1 LOW - central IVR randomization stratified by age. D2 LOW - double-blind matched saline placebo. D3 LOW - 97% primary follow-up. D4 LOW - central PCR confirmation + blinded adjudication. D5 LOW - SAP locked.

evidence.label: Eligibility (AACT-derived)
evidence.text: AACT-derived (auto-populated 2026-05-04). Sex: ALL; min age 60 Years; healthy volunteers: t. CRITERIA: "Inclusion Criteria:~* A male or female ≥ 60 YOA at the time of first vaccination, who live in the community (community dwelling participants) or in a long-term care facility (LTCF participants).~* Participants who, in the opinion of the investigator, can and will comply with the requirements of the protocol.~Note: In case of physical incapacity that would preclude the self-completion of the diary cards and/or questionnaires, either site staff can assist the participant (for activities performed...

NCT05127434.name: ConquerRSV
NCT05127434.group: Adults >=60, mRNA-1345 (Moderna mRESVIA) 50 mcg IM single dose vs placebo
NCT05127434.snippet: Source: Wilson E et al. N Engl J Med 2023;389:2233-2244 (ConquerRSV mRNA-1345).

evidence.label: Enrollment
evidence.text: 35,541 adults aged >=60 years randomized 1:1 double-blind to mRNA-1345 50 mcg IM single dose (n=17,572) or matched placebo (n=17,516). Event-driven primary analysis.

evidence.label: Primary - RSV-LRTD with >=2 Signs/Symptoms
evidence.text: RSV-LRTD with >=2 signs/symptoms: vaccine 9/17,572 vs placebo 55/17,516; vaccine efficacy 83.7% (95.88% CI 66.1 to 92.2). Corresponds to relative risk 0.16 (95% CI 0.08 to 0.33; P<0.001). Primary endpoint met.

evidence.label: Co-Primary - RSV-LRTD with >=3 Signs/Symptoms
evidence.text: RSV-LRTD with >=3 signs/symptoms: vaccine 3/17,572 vs placebo 18/17,516; vaccine efficacy 82.4% (95% CI 34.8 to 95.3). RR 0.17 (95% CI 0.05-0.56). Efficacy maintained across age strata.

evidence.label: Risk of Bias (RoB 2.0)
evidence.text: D1 LOW - central IVR randomization stratified by age and site. D2 LOW - double-blind placebo-controlled. D3 LOW - 97% primary follow-up. D4 LOW - central PCR confirmation + blinded adjudication panel. D5 LOW - SAP locked.

evidence.label: Eligibility (AACT-derived)
evidence.text: AACT-derived (auto-populated 2026-05-04). Sex: ALL; min age 60 Years; healthy volunteers: t. CRITERIA: "Key Inclusion Criteria (Part A):~* Adults ≥ 60 years of age who are primarily responsible for self-care and activities of daily living. title: RapidMeta Respiratory | RSV Vaccines in Older Adults v1.0
